checkpoint: Voynich OS v12.4 - Showcase Evidence Package and Visual Atlas
purpose: Package selected manifest evidence, visual atlas, route aliases, and claim boundaries into a public showcase layer.
public_demonstration_claim: Voynich OS can demonstrate a governed artifact chain: corpus, generated outputs, diagnostic vectors, manuscript state, ledgers, audits, RCC route maps, output manifests, aliases, and showcase surfaces.

top_families_by_file_count.title: Meaning/vector JSON files
top_families_by_file_count.claim_boundary: Meaning vectors and clusters are diagnostics, not literal meanings.

top_families_by_file_count.title: Corpus text files
top_families_by_file_count.claim_boundary: Corpus files are source material for modeling; they are not decipherment.

top_families_by_file_count.title: Folio output JSON files
top_families_by_file_count.claim_boundary: Folio outputs are symbolic diagnostics, not translation.

top_families_by_file_count.title: Documentation Markdown files
top_families_by_file_count.claim_boundary: Documentation guides interpretation; it is not evidence by itself.

top_families_by_file_count.title: Manuscript-level state JSON files
top_families_by_file_count.claim_boundary: Manuscript-level state is synthesis output, not proof of authorial intent.

top_families_by_file_count.title: Ledger JSONL files
top_families_by_file_count.claim_boundary: Ledgers record process history, not correctness proof.

top_families_by_file_count.title: State audit JSON files
top_families_by_file_count.claim_boundary: Audit state records observed repo properties, not manuscript interpretation.

top_families_by_file_count.title: README audit reports
top_families_by_file_count.claim_boundary: README audits validate public framing, not manuscript meaning.

top_families_by_file_count.title: RCC Nexus reports
top_families_by_file_count.claim_boundary: RCC-N validates navigation, not code correctness or decipherment.

top_families_by_file_count.title: Corpus JSON files
top_families_by_file_count.claim_boundary: Corpus JSON is source/metadata structure, not semantic proof.

aliases.reason: Source corpus path is active and should remain stable until package-level migration is planned.
aliases.claim_boundary: Corpus presence is not translation or decipherment.

aliases.reason: Generated folio JSON artifacts must be manifested before any folder migration.
aliases.claim_boundary: Folio graph outputs are diagnostics, not proof of manuscript meaning.

aliases.reason: Meaning/vector outputs are structurally important but semantically bounded.
aliases.claim_boundary: Meaning vectors are diagnostics, not validated semantic readings.

aliases.reason: Manuscript-level synthesis state requires stable provenance.
aliases.claim_boundary: Manuscript state is synthesis output, not proof of decipherment.

aliases.reason: Ledger path is active; future move requires backward-compatible route update.
aliases.claim_boundary: Ledger continuity records process history, not correctness proof.

aliases.reason: Legacy export surface should not be moved until route aliases and references are audited.
aliases.claim_boundary: Legacy output preservation is reproducibility support, not validation.

aliases.reason: Legacy import surface should not be moved until route aliases and references are audited.
aliases.claim_boundary: Legacy input preservation is reproducibility support, not validation.

claim_locks: Generated outputs are task-bounded artifacts, not universal proof.
Output manifests prove artifact observability, not decipherment or translation.

next_layer.recommended: Voynich OS v12.5 - Reproducibility Replay Contract
next_layer.reason: After outputs are showcased, the next proof layer should define which artifacts can be regenerated, by which command, from which inputs, with which expected hashes or tolerances.
